title: Anyone interested in selling their app?
excerpt:
Hey Community, 
We are looking to buy an app with traction. 
If anyone is interested in selling please let me know at adi@piricgroup.com 
Thanks and happy coding!

posts.author: pirke (Adi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Community,

We are looking to buy an app with traction.
If anyone is interested in selling please let me know at adi@piricgroup.com

Thanks and happy coding!

posts.author: samicaracand (Sami Caracand (DocuGen))
posts.cookedHtml: What’s your budget? Can you tell us more about you or your company?

posts.author: pirke (Adi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @samicaracand ! Thanks for the message.
Sure
I am Adi and I run Piric Group.
We are looking for apps in the $1k-$5k MRR range ideally

Best,
